#### `circleci namespace get <name> [flags]`

Get details of a namespace

| Flag          | Description                                      |
| ------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `--jq string` | Process values from the response using jq syntax |
| `--json`      | Output as JSON                                   |


**Arguments:**

`<name>` is the name of the namespace to look up, for example, `myorg`.
